sn15.10:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā rājagahe vihārati gijjhakūṭe pabbate. Tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi: "bhikkhavo"ti.
sn15.10:1.2: "Bhadante"ti te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ. Bhagavā etadavoca:
sn15.10:2.1: "Anamataggoyaṁ, bhikkhave, saṁsāro … pe … ekapuggalassa, bhikkhave, kappaṁ sandhāvato saṁsarato siyā evaṁ mahā aṭṭhikaṅkalo aṭṭhipuñjo aṭṭhirāsi yathāyaṁ vepullo pabbato, sace saṁhārako assa, sambhatañca na vinasseyya. Taṁ kissa hetu? Anamataggoyaṁ, bhikkhave, saṁsāro … pe … alaṁ vimuccitun"ti.
sn15.10:3.1: Idamavoca bhagavā. Idaṁ vatvāna sugato athāparaṁ etadavoca satthā:
sn15.10:5.1: So kho panāyaṁ akkhāto,vepullo pabbato mahā;Uttaro gijjhakūṭassa,magadhānaṁ giribbaje.
sn15.10:6.1: Yato ca ariyasaccāni,sammappaññāya passati;Dukkhaṁ dukkhasamup pādaṁ,dukkhassa ca atikkamaṁ;Ariyaṁ caṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ,dukkhūpasamagāminaṁ.
